title: Add colorConverter.ts utility
description: Create src/utils/colorConverter.ts with HEX, RGB, and HSL conversion functions (hexToRgb, rgbToHex, rgbToHsl, hslToRgb) following the existing single-function utility pattern in src/utils/. Note: src/utils/color.ts already implements this same functionality - this task requires a separate file named colorConverter.ts as specified.
existing_patterns: src/utils/color.ts - single-function utility files in src/utils/ with co-located .test.ts files using vitest describe/it/expect
